positive: A highly stylized, minimalist composition featuring a majestic mountain peak silhouette at sunset. The foreground contains clean, simplified abstract geometric elements like crescent moons and flowing river lines, rendered in deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream tones. The overall style is neo-geometric abstract art, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use dramatic, high-contrast lighting that emphasizes clean lines and crisp edges. The central focus is the layered mountain profile, providing a strong vertical element. Composition must be perfectly balanced, suitable for centered placement on clothing. Vector art influence, high resolution, clean silhouette design.
